name: United States
summary: US starter profile for healthcare quality, safety, teamwork, and measurement. Local payer, state, hospital, IRB, and compliance requirements must still be checked.
use_for: US quality and safety source orientation

incident_learning.position: US incident-learning routes are local and organisation-specific. Use this profile only to prompt source discovery and safety-team involvement, not to decide reportability or legal disclosure duties.
boundaries: check local patient-safety, risk, compliance, and legal routes
do not process identifiable event narratives
